{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/163135786?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Telecaster2147", "id": 163135786, "login": "Telecaster2147", "node_id": "U_kgDOCblBKg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Telecaster2147", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42438", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

OpenClaw's outbound host-media attachment read helper could enable host-local file reads based on global or agent-level read access without also honoring sender and group-scoped tool policy. In channel deployments that used `toolsBySender` or group policy to deny `read` for less-trusted senders, a denied sender could still trigger host-media attachment loading and cause readable local files to be returned through the outbound media path.

## Affected Versions

This issue is known to affect OpenClaw 2026.4.9. Earlier versions were not confirmed during triage, so the advisory range is intentionally scoped to `>= 2026.4.9 < 2026.4.10`.

## Impact

Affected deployments are those that both allow host read or filesystem root expansion at the global/agent level and rely on sender or group-scoped policy to deny `read` for some channel participants. In that configuration, the intended sender/group authorization boundary could be bypassed for outbound media reads, potentially disclosing host-local files readable by the OpenClaw process.

The issue does not require treating the model prompt as the security boundary. The vulnerable behavior was a concrete policy enforcement mismatch: sender/group policy denied `read`, while the host-media read helper could still be installed without that sender context.

## Resolution

Fixed in OpenClaw 2026.4.10 by PR #64459, commit `c949af9fabf3873b5b7c484090cb5f5ab6049a98`. The fix threads sender, session, channel, and account context into outbound media access resolution and intersects host-media read capability creation with the existing group tool policy for `read`. When a concrete sender/group override denies `read`, OpenClaw no longer creates the host `readFile` media capability.

Additional attachment canonicalization hardening shipped in 2026.4.14, but the authorization bypass described here was fixed in 2026.4.10.

## Credit

Thanks to @Telecaster2147 for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00236, "percentile": 0.14508}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:17:57Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42438"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:17:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/64459", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/c949af9fabf3873b5b7c484090cb5f5ab6049a98", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Sender policy bypass in host media attachment reads allows unauthorized local file disclosure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:49:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhpv-5j76-m56h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.9, < 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Sender policy bypass in host media attachment reads allows unauthorized local file disclosure
